overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural farmland landscape. The character traverses golden wheat fields, passes a peasant woman working with a farming tool, crosses a small stream, and continues along a dirt road lined with wooden fences and decorative archways under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland field with scattered deciduous trees

events.description: approaching a peasant woman working with a farming tool in the wheat field
passing the peasant woman on the left side while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall golden grass toward a peasant woman working in the field

notable_agents.action: peasant woman swinging a scythe-like farming tool, harvesting wheat

entered.detail: tall golden grass swaying in the wind, covering the ground completely
deciduous trees with green foliage scattered across the landscape
dense line of pine trees forming the horizon boundary
traditional conical haystacks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide-open farmland field with golden wheat swaying in the wind. The camera follows the character walking forward through the tall grass, approaching a peasant woman who is actively working with a farming tool. After passing her on the left, the character continues toward distant haystacks and a tree line under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmland field with haystacks and small water crossing

events.description: crossing a small shallow stream with muddy banks and green reeds
walking between two large conical haystacks

agents.ego_description: continuing through the field, crossing a small stream and navigating between haystacks

entered.detail: shallow water crossing with muddy banks and tall green reeds
low green shrubs and bushes at the edges of the grass field

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the golden wheat field, crossing a small shallow stream with muddy banks. The terrain features scattered bushes and several large haystacks that the character passes between. The distant forest remains visible in the background as the character moves through the open farmland.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road with wooden fences and decorative archways

events.description: transitioning from grass field onto a dirt road with wooden fences
passing under a wooden archway with hanging triangular decorations

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt road between wooden fences, approaching and passing under decorative archways

notable_agents.action: distant peasant working in the field beyond the fence

entered.detail: unpaved rural road with visible wheel ruts, scattered stones, and patches of grass
rustic wooden post and rail fence lining the left side of the road
rustic wooden post and rail fence lining the right side of the road
tall wooden structure spanning the road with hanging triangular pennant decorations
medieval-style lantern mounted on a wooden post beside the road

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the field onto a dirt road lined with wooden fences on both sides. The road features decorative wooden archways with hanging pennants that the character passes under. A distant peasant can be seen working in the fields beyond the fence. The terrain is now defined by the dirt path and wooden structures rather than the open wheat fields.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive golden wheat field that gradually transitions into a structured rural road. It begins with the character walking through tall, swaying grass toward a peasant woman working with a farming tool, moving past her toward distant haystacks under a bright blue sky. As the character continues forward, the open field gives way to a shallow stream with muddy banks and scattered bushes before passing between large haystacks. The scene then shifts from the wild farmland onto a defined dirt road lined with wooden fences, where the character passes under decorative wooden archways adorned with hanging pennants. Finally, the terrain settles into this structured path, leaving the open wheat fields and distant laborers behind the fence.
